project_type: Electron + React + Python Desktop App (Telegram export tool)
build_system: npm + vite for frontend, pip/pyproject.toml for Python backend
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio for Python (68 tests), vitest configured but no frontend tests yet
build_command: cd teleexport && npx tsc --noEmit && npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron.json && npx vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest: cd teleexport && python -m pytest tests/python -v (all 68 tests pass). 2. Run tsc for frontend: npx tsc --noEmit. 3. Run tsc for electron: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron.json. 4. Run vite build: npx vite build.
setup_instructions: cd teleexport && npm install && pip install telethon jinja2 pillow orjson aiofiles tqdm emoji python-dateutil colorama pytest pytest-asyncio
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Python 3.11 via pyenv, Node 22 via nvm. No Electron runtime available for integration tests.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Python: async/await throughout, JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout, snake_case. TypeScript: Zustand stores, React functional components, lucide-react icons, Tailwind CSS 4, camelCase. IPC uses JSON-RPC protocol with id/method/params pattern.
directory_structure: teleexport/ is the project root. electron/ has main process TS files (compiled to CJS). src/ has React frontend (compiled by Vite). python/ has the backend (run as child_process). tests/python/ has pytest tests.
